title: Automation of protein purification for structural genomics.
author: Kim Y Dementieva I Zhou M Wu R Lezondra L Quartey P Joachimiak G Korolev O Li H Joachimiak A
content: S-EPMC2778303 PMC2778303 Automation of protein purification for structural genomics. A critical issue in structural genomics, and in structural biology in general, is the availability of high-quality samples. The additional challenge in structural genomics is the need to produce high numbers
